title: Thomas Friedel - GitHub
text:
GitHub Profile: Thomas Friedel (tfriedel)
Bio: Machine Learning Engineer
Company: PEAT
Location: Berlin
Top Languages: Python, Java, C

Top Projects:
- trackanalyzer (61 stars, Java): java command line tool for estimating musical key and bpm of digital recordings, to aid DJs in harmonic mixing.
- neural-image-assessment (21 stars, Python): Implementation of NIMA: Neural Image Assessment in Keras
- python-lightify (18 stars, Python): Python module for Osram lightify. This is a work in progress.
- foobar2000-export (14 stars, Java): I reverse engineered the foobar2000 database and playlist formats. You can export to m3u playlists for example.
- tweethoarder (3 stars, Python): dumps twitter likes & bookmarks
- blensor (2 stars, C): Blender Sensor Simulation
- claude-office-skills (438 stars, Python): Office document creation and editing skills for Claude Code - PPTX, DOCX, XLSX, and PDF workflows with automation support
- antigravity_prompts (25 stars): Reverse-engineered prompts and analysis from Antigravity (Google's VS Code fork with AI)
